title: Parity: link (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: link. Rust: complete (2501 LoC). Zephyr: complete (3059 LoC). Python: partial (904 LoC). Gap: Python missing schnorr signatures, identity management, full link-layer security. Need to port Rust/Zephyr link features to Python.
